name: Kalter Kartoffelsalat (Cold Potato Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
2. In a medium saucepan, cook the potatoes in boiling salted water until tender.
3. Drain the potatoes, reserving 3/4 cup of potato water.
4. Dice the potatoes and add oil and minced onion; toss gently.
5. In a small saucepan, bring the reserved potato water to a boil; pour over the potatoes and onion mixture.
6. Keep at room temperature for 2 to 3 hours.
7. Stir in vinegar, mustard, sugar, and dill seeds. The salad will be creamy.
8. Serve at room temperature.
